brand.name: Your Brand Name
brand.tagline: One-line summary of what you do and for whom
brand.niche: e.g. spiritual yoga counseling, fractional CFO, executive coaching

positioning.uvp: I help [target market] achieve [outcome] by [unique method] that [eliminates pain point].

target_audience.who: e.g. burned-out tech executives, early-stage founders, senior women in transition
target_audience.pain: e.g. disconnected from body and purpose despite professional success
target_audience.desire: e.g. sustainable performance and inner clarity without leaving their career

differentiators: e.g. 20+ years in corporate environments — I understand the pressure from the inside
e.g. Yoga philosophy meets executive coaching frameworks
positioning.competitors: e.g. generalist wellness coaches, meditation apps, traditional therapists

voice.tone: e.g. calm, grounded, direct, warm, non-dogmatic
voice.persona: e.g. A trusted guide who has walked the same path — not a teacher on a pedestal

audio.bed_mood: e.g. calm, grounded, meditative, minimal, warm — used to generate music beds
audio.note: Voice is always the primary signal. The bed is background texture only.

content_pillars.name: pillar-one
content_pillars.description: What this content category covers and why it matters to your audience
